overview: Tastee is an AI-powered food decision web app that eliminates decision fatigue by presenting users with 3 smart Indian food picks tailored to their budget, mood, and taste preferences — all in seconds.
features: AI-powered decision engine with mood & budget matching
Swipe-to-like food cards with haptic feedback
Results page with Best Pick card, share links, and session persistence
History page with sortable saved picks
Smooth 300ms page transitions and animated landing page
